title: hibiscus bartlingianus
intro: Hibiscus bartlingianus, also known as the Yellow Hibiscus or Red Hibiscus, is a species of flowering plant in the mallow family (Malvaceae) that is native to tropical and subtropical regions. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to lower blood pressure, act as a diuretic, and exhibit antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Hibiscus bartlingianus include reducing the risk of heart disease, alleviating symptoms of menopause, and supporting healthy digestion. Hibiscus bartlingianus can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, capsules, and extracts, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
